buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 flutter-sdk && flutter-sdk/bin/flutter config --enable-web && flutter-sdk/bin/flutter pub get && flutter-sdk/bin/flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
